data.title: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq Pounded As Oil Surges; Honeywell Crosses Trendline (Live Coverage)
data.description: The price of oil surged to over $92 per barrel, causing concerns in the market. However, there was positive movement from Micron and other chip equipment companies, which experienced a rally. The Nasdaq saw a significant decline due to the oil price increase. In related news, Honeywell surpassed a key trendline. This live coverage highlights the latest updates on the stock market.
Trump touts US Intel investment. $INTC

data.title: Croatia's Grid Operator Approves Power Supply Blueprint for Pantheon AI's 1 GW Data Center
data.description: In Croatia, Pantheon Atlas LLC has received approval from the national transmission system operator, HOPS, for a blueprint to supply a planned 1 GW hyperscale AI data center in Topusko. This approval also includes open grid access for over 5 GW of new renewable capacity currently facing bottlenecks in the country. The technical and regulatory feasibility of providing electricity at scale for this project has been confirmed by HOPS, marking a significant milestone towards construction.

data.title: AAI 2026: AMD Delivers Full-Stack Compute for the Agentic AI Era
data.description: AMD has recently introduced an extensive range of high-performance computing and physical AI portfolios, unveiling their initial rack-scale AI solution and the cutting-edge AMD Helios, recognized as the world's most potent AI rack. This launch signifies AMD's commitment to offering advanced solutions in the field of artificial intelligence and high-performance computing.

data.title: TYLER SIIRA NAMED PRESIDENT OF SOUTHERN CHAMPION TRAY
data.description: In the city of Chattanooga, Tennessee, the renowned company Southern Champion Tray (SCT) has recently appointed Tyler Siira as President, a role he officially assumed on July 1, 2026. Siira takes over from Brian Hunt, who remains in his position as Chief Executive Officer. This leadership transition marks a significant development for SCT, with Siira now at the helm of the company while Hunt continues to lead as CEO. The change became effective on the specified date, consolidating the leadership team at SCT and setting the course for future endeavors.

data.title: AMI Announces AMI Rack Manager Support for AMD Helios Rackscale Solution and Aptio V and MegaRAC OneTree Support for 6th Gen AMD EPYC Processors, Accelerating Deployment for AI Data Centers Worldwide
data.description: AMI, a prominent company specializing in AI platform firmware and management, has recently introduced its certified AMI Rack Manager software for the latest AMD Helios™ rackscale solution. Alongside this, the company has also launched the Aptio® V BIOS/UEFI firmware and MegaRAC OneTree™. This development was disclosed in Atlanta and San Francisco on July 23, 2026. AMI's new software offering is set to enhance the performance and functionality of AMD Helios™ racks, solidifying their position as the industry leader.

data.title: Nota AI Joins the AMD Robotics Partner Network to Accelerate Development of Next Generation Physical AI Solutions - Extending its on-device AI optimization technology into the robotics sector
data.description: Partners with an AMD-approved robotics ecosystem, working with ODMs, ISVs, and other collaborators to enable on-device AI implementation for robotics via AI model compression and hardware-aware optimization techniques. Enhances AI optimization abilities across smart devices.

data.title: MSI Launches 6th Gen AMD EPYC™ Server Portfolio
data.description: MSI has recently announced the launch of cutting-edge GPU, multi-node, and enterprise platforms aimed at boosting performance for various operations such as AI, cloud computing, HPC, virtualization, and critical business tasks. This development was disclosed in San Francisco on July 23, 2026. The new server offerings from MSI will be powered by the latest 6th Gen AMD EPYC™ Server CPUs, promising enhanced capabilities for demanding workloads.

data.title: As U.S. Overdose Deaths Fall, Arizona's Keep Climbing: Catalina Behavioral Health Launches Free Naloxone Guide for Families in Response
data.description: A recent online resource has been launched to assist Arizona families in identifying and responding to opioid overdoses with naloxone. Data from May CDC reports highlight Arizona as experiencing one of the largest rises in the country. This initiative is spearheaded by Catalina Behavioral Health in Tucson, Arizona, aiming to provide vital information and support to combat the increasing opioid crisis.

data.title: MiTAC Computing Advances Agentic AI Infrastructure with 6th Gen AMD EPYC™ Server CPUs
data.description: On July 23, 2026, MiTAC Computing Technology Corp., a renowned provider of high-performance server solutions worldwide and a subsidiary of MiTAC Holdings Corporation (TWSE:3706), showcased its newest agentic AI infrastructure at AMD Advancing AI event.

data.title: BGL Advises ARX Wireless on the Sale of a Wireless Communications Tower Portfolio
data.description: A significant transaction involving the sale of a wireless communications tower portfolio has been completed in New York. Brown Gibbons Lang & Company (BGL), a prominent independent investment bank and financial advisory firm, recently facilitated the deal as the exclusive financial advisor to ARX Wireless. This transaction marks a notable milestone in the industry, with the specific details, including the financial figures and the number of towers involved, reflecting the robust nature of the deal. The involvement of BGL underscores its expertise and leadership in managing such complex financial transactions.

data.title: The Inner Circle acknowledges R. Scot Buell as a Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence
data.description: In Coleville, California on July 23, 2026, R. Scot Buell was recognized as a Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence in The Inner Circle for his significant contributions to Petroleum Engineering and Innovation. Buell holds a Bachelor of Science degree and is acknowledged for his outstanding achievements in the field.

data.title: The Inner Circle acknowledges Frances Iger Laterman as a Pinnacle Professional Member
data.description: A renowned figure in the classical contemporary art world, Frances Iger Laterman has been recognized as a Pinnacle Professional Member for her significant contributions. This acknowledgment was highlighted in The Inner Circle, a prestigious platform. Frances Iger Laterman stands out for her pioneering work in the field, solidifying her reputation as a leading figure. The recognition underscores her impact and dedication to advancing classical contemporary art.
